member.name: T:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.Constants
member.summary: Class containing values for commonly used evidence keys

member.name: F:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.Constants.IPV4_LENGTH
member.summary: The number of bytes in an IPv4

member.name: F:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.Constants.IPV6_LENGTH
member.summary: The number of bytes in an IPv6

member.name: T:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.Data.IpDataBaseOnPremise`1
member.summary: Base class used for all 51Degrees on-premise results classes.

member.name: T:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.Data.IpDataBaseOnPremise`1.ResultsManager
member.summary: This inner class manages the lifetime and access to the swig result sets.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.Data.IpDataBaseOnPremise`1.ResultsManager.ResultsList
member.summary: Get the list of result objects. After this property accessed, the method will throw an error if it is called.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.Data.IpDataBaseOnPremise`1.ResultsManager.HasResults
member.summary: Check if there are results objects available.
member.returns: True if there are results objects available.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.Data.IpDataBaseOnPremise`1.ResultsManager.AddResult(`0)
member.summary: Add the specified result object to the list of results.
member.param: The result object to add to the list.
member.exception: Thrown if the property for this instance has already been accessed.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.Data.IpDataBaseOnPremise`1.ResultsManager.ResultsAccessed
member.summary: True if the property for this instance has been accessed. False if not.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.Data.IpDataBaseOnPremise`1.ResultsManager.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Dispose
member.param: False if called from the finalizer

member.name: M:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.Data.IpDataBaseOnPremise`1.ResultsManager.Finalize
member.summary: Finalizer

member.name: M:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.Data.IpDataBaseOnPremise`1.ResultsManager.Dispose
member.summary: Dispose

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.Data.IpDataBaseOnPremise`1.Results
member.summary: A instance, which can be used to add new results objects and access those that have been added so far. Once results are accessed, new ones cannot be added.
Constructor
member.param: The logger instance to use.
The Pipeline that created this data instance.
The engine that create this data instance.
The to use if a requested property does not exist.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.Data.IpDataBaseOnPremise`1.PropertyIsAvailable(System.String)
member.summary: Check if a specified property is available in the results.
member.param: The name of the property to check.
member.returns: True if the property is available. False if not.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.Data.IpDataBaseOnPremise`1.GetValues(System.String)
member.summary: Get the values this instance has for the specified property.
member.param: The name of the property to get values for.
member.returns: A list of values wrapped in a instance.

member.summary: Get string value this instance has for the specified property
member.param: The name of the property to get value for.
member.returns: A wrapped in a instance.

member.returns: A wrapped in a instance.

member.returns: A wrapped in a instance.

member.returns: A wrapped in a instance.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.Data.IpDataBaseOnPremise`1.AsDictionary
member.summary: By default, the base dictionary will not be populated as doing so is a fairly expensive operation. Instead, we override the AsDictionary method to populate the dictionary on-demand.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.Data.IpDataBaseOnPremise`1.GetPropertyType(System.String)
member.summary: Get the for the specified property This is based on the meta-data that is supplied by the engine.
member.param: The name of the property to get the type of.
member.returns: The instance for the requested property.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.Data.IpDataBaseOnPremise`1.TryGetValue``1(System.String,``0@)
member.summary: Try to get the value for the specified key. This overrides the base implementation to get values using the abstract methods on this class rather than using the dictionary-based storage mechanism from the base-class.
member.typeparam: The expected type of the resulting value.
member.param: The key to use to retrieve the value.
Out parameter that will be populated with the value.
member.returns: True if that value was retrieved successfully. False if not.
member.exception: Thrown if the value was not of the expected type.

member.name: T:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.FlowElements.IOnPremiseIpiEngine
member.summary: Interface for additional members that are unique to on-premise IP intelligence engines.

member.name: E:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.FlowElements.IOnPremiseIpiEngine.RefreshCompleted
member.summary: This event is fired whenever the data that this engine makes use of has been updated.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.FlowElements.IOnPremiseIpiEngine.Components
member.summary: Get meta-data for all components that are populated by this engine.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.FlowElements.IOnPremiseIpiEngine.Profiles
member.summary: Get meta-data for all profiles that can the returned by this engine.

member.name: T:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.FlowElements.OnPremiseIpiEngineBase`1
member.summary: On-premise IP intelligence engine base class.
member.typeparam: The specific type of IP intelligence data instances returned by this engine.

member.summary: Constructor
member.param: Logger for this engine to use.
The factory method to use when creating a new aspect data instance.
The path to use for any temporary files the engine needs to create.

member.name: E:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.FlowElements.OnPremiseIpiEngineBase`1.RefreshCompleted
member.summary: This event is fired after IP intelligence data has been successfully refreshed.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.FlowElements.OnPremiseIpiEngineBase`1.ReadBytesFromStream(System.IO.Stream)
member.summary: Get the bytes from the specified stream.
member.exception: Thrown if a required parameter is null

member.name: M:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.FlowElements.OnPremiseIpiEngineBase`1.AddDataFile(FiftyOne.Pipeline.Engines.Data.IAspectEngineDataFile)
member.summary: Add the specified data file to the engine
member.exception: Thrown if a required parameter is null

member.name: T:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.FlowElements.OnPremiseIpiEngineBuilderBase`2
member.summary: Fluent builder that is used to create an on-premise IP intelligence aspect engine.
member.typeparam: The type of engine builder for fluent methods to return.
The type of engine that will be built.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.FlowElements.OnPremiseIpiEngineBuilderBase`2.#ctor(FiftyOne.Pipeline.Engines.Services.IDataUpdateService)
member.summary: Constructor
member.param: The to use when registering data files to check for for automatic updates.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.FlowElements.OnPremiseIpiEngineBuilderBase`2.SetConcurrency(System.UInt16)
member.summary: Set the expected number of concurrent operations using the engine. This sets the concurrency of the internal caches to mitigate excessive contention.
member.param: Expected concurrent accesses
member.returns: This builder

member.name: T:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.IpEvidenceValue
member.summary: Parses IP address evidence values the same way the native engine does, so the managed layer and the native lookup always agree on which address a value contains. The native parser reads a single address from the start of the value and stops at the first break character (comma, space, slash, closing bracket, newline, or a colon once the address is known to be IPv4). Everything after the break is ignored, which is what makes port suffixes ("203.0.113.9:54321", "[2001:db8::9]:443"), forwarded chains (first entry) and CIDR ranges (prefix address) parse. One deliberate divergence: IPv4 is gated on a canonical dotted quad, so legacy forms that would be reinterpreted ("85.118.2", "192.168.015.1", "0x7f.0.0.1") fail here rather than resolving to a different address than the sender meant.

member.name: F:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.IpEvidenceValue.BreakChars
member.summary: Characters at which the native parser stops reading an address and ignores the remainder of the value.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.IpEvidenceValue.TryParse(System.String,System.Net.IPAddress@)
member.summary: Try to parse the evidence value as the IP address the native engine would read from it. When this fails the native engine would reject the value too, aborting its evidence walk, so a failing value must not be handed to it.
member.param: The raw evidence value.
The parsed address, or null.
member.returns: True when an address was parsed.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.IpEvidenceValue.TryParseIpv4Strict(System.String,System.Net.IPAddress@)
member.summary: Parse an IPv4 token gated on a canonical dotted quad. The round trip rejects the legacy inet_aton notations (octal or hex components, fewer than four parts, a bare integer) that IPAddress.TryParse would silently reinterpret as a different address.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.IpEvidenceValue.TryParseIpv6(System.String,System.Net.IPAddress@)
member.summary: Parse an IPv6 token. A zone index is rejected, the native parser treats '%' as an invalid character, and so must anything that is not an IPv6 address, a bracketed IPv4 for example.

member.name: T:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.IpIntelligenceData
member.summary: Abstract base class for properties relating to an IP. This includes the network, and location.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.IpIntelligenceData.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{FiftyOne.Pipeline.Engines.Data.AspectDataBase},FiftyOne.Pipeline.Core.FlowElements.IPipeline,FiftyOne.Pipeline.Engines.FlowElements.IAspectEngine,FiftyOne.Pipeline.Engines.Services.IMissingPropertyService)
member.summary: Constructor.
member.param: The logger for this instance to use.
The Pipeline this data instance has been created by.
The engine this data instance has been created by.
The missing property service to use when a requested property does not exist.

member.name: F:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.IpIntelligenceData.PropertyTypes
member.summary: Dictionary of property value types, keyed on the string name of the type.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.IpIntelligenceData.AccuracyRadiusMax
member.summary: Radius in kilometers of the circle centred around the most probable location that encompasses the entire area. Where multiple areas are returned, this will only cover the area the most probable location is in. See Areas property. This will likely be a very large distance. It is recommend to use the AccuracyRadiusMin property.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.IpIntelligenceData.AccuracyRadiusMin
member.summary: Radius in kilometers of the largest circle centred around the most probable location that fits within the area. Where multiple areas are returned, only the area that the most probable location falls within is considered. See Areas property.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.IpIntelligenceData.Areas
member.summary: Any shapes associated with the location. Usually this is the area which the IP range covers. This is returned as a WKT String stored as a reduced format of WKB.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.IpIntelligenceData.Asn
member.summary: Autonomous System Number associated with the IP address.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.IpIntelligenceData.AsnName
member.summary: The name registered to the Asn associated with the IP address.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.IpIntelligenceData.BrowserDiversity
member.summary: Refers to the diversity of browsers observed from the IP range. An integer between 1-10, a lower value indicates a low number of browsers seen per IP address, while a higher value indicates a high number of browsers seen per IP address. A 0 value indicates that the probability is unknown.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.IpIntelligenceData.ConnectionType
member.summary: Indicates the type of connection being used. Returns either Broadband, Cellular, or Hosting and Anonymous.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.IpIntelligenceData.ContinentCode2
member.summary: The 3-character ISO 3166-1 continent code for the supplied location.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.IpIntelligenceData.ContinentName
member.summary: The name of the continent the supplied location is in.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.IpIntelligenceData.Country
member.summary: The name of the country that the supplied location is in.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.IpIntelligenceData.CountryCode
member.summary: The 2-character ISO 3166-1 code of the country that the supplied location is in.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.IpIntelligenceData.CountryCode3
member.summary: The 3-character ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code of the country that the supplied location is in.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.IpIntelligenceData.CountryCodesGeographical
member.summary: A list of countries in ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code format that overlap with the area likely associated with the provided evidence, weighted and ordered by each country's proportion of the area. Administrative areas that cannot be cleanly resolved to the country level will not contribute to the resulting data.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.IpIntelligenceData.CountryCodesPopulation
member.summary: A list of countries in ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code format that overlap with the area likely associated with the provided evidence, weighted and ordered by each country's proportion of the total population within the area. Administrative areas that cannot be cleanly resolved to the country level will not contribute to the resulting data.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.IpIntelligenceData.County
member.summary: The name of the county that the supplied location is in. In this case, a county is defined as an administrative sub-section of a country or state.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.IpIntelligenceData.CurrencyCode
member.summary: The Alpha-3 ISO 4217 code of the currency associated with the supplied location.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.IpIntelligenceData.DialCode
member.summary: ITU international telephone numbering plan code for the country.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.IpIntelligenceData.HardwareDiversity
member.summary: Refers to the diversity of hardware devices observed from the IP range. An integer between 1-10, a lower value indicates a low number of devices seen per IP address, while a higher value indicates a high number of devices seen per IP address. A 0 value indicates that the probability is unknown.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.IpIntelligenceData.HumanProbability
member.summary: The confidence that the IP address is a human user versus associated with hosting. A 0-10 value where; 0-3: Low confidence the user is human, 4-6: Medium confidence, 7-10: High confidence. A -1 value indicates that the probability is unknown.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.IpIntelligenceData.Ip
member.summary: The IPv4 address of the request.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.IpIntelligenceData.IpRangeEnd
member.summary: End of the IP range to which the evidence IP belongs.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.IpIntelligenceData.IpRangeStart
member.summary: Start of the IP range to which the evidence IP belongs.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.IpIntelligenceData.IpV6
member.summary: The IPv6 address of the request.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.IpIntelligenceData.IsBroadband
member.summary: Indicates whether the IP address is associated with a broadband connection. Includes DSL, Cable, Fibre, and Satellite connections.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.IpIntelligenceData.IsCellular
member.summary: Indicates whether the IP address is associated with a cellular network.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.IpIntelligenceData.IsEu
member.summary: Indicates whether the country of the supplied location is within the European Union.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.IpIntelligenceData.IsHosted
member.summary: Indicates whether the IP address is associated with hosting. Includes both hosting and anonymised connections such as hosting networks, hosting ASNs, VPNs, proxies, TOR networks, and unreachable IP addresses.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.IpIntelligenceData.Iso31662Lvl4
member.summary: The ISO 3166-2 code for the supplied location. This is using the 'ISO3166-2-lvl4' property from OpenStreetMap.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.IpIntelligenceData.Iso31662Lvl4SubdivisionOnly
member.summary: The alphanumeric code representing the subdivision from the ISO 3166-2 code of the supplied location. This is using the 'ISO3166-2-lvl4' property from OpenStreetMap.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.IpIntelligenceData.Iso31662Lvl8
member.summary: The ISO 3166-2 code for the supplied location. This is using the 'ISO3166-2-lvl8' property from OpenStreetMap.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.IpIntelligenceData.Iso31662Lvl8SubdivisionOnly
member.summary: The alphanumeric code representing the subdivision from the ISO 3166-2 code of the supplied location. This is using the 'ISO3166-2-lvl8' property from OpenStreetMap.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.IpIntelligenceData.IsProxy
member.summary: Indicates whether the IP address is associated with a Proxy server.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.IpIntelligenceData.IsPublicRouter
member.summary: Indicates whether the IP address is associated with a public router.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.IpIntelligenceData.IsTor
member.summary: Indicates whether the IP address is associated with a TOR server.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.IpIntelligenceData.IsVPN
member.summary: Indicates whether the IP address is associated with a VPN server.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.IpIntelligenceData.LanguageCode
member.summary: The Alpha-2 ISO 639 Language code associated with the supplied location.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.IpIntelligenceData.Latitude
member.summary: Average latitude of the IP. For privacy, this is randomized within around 1 kilometer of the result. Randomized result will change only once per day.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.IpIntelligenceData.LocationConfidence
member.summary: The confidence in the town and country provided.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.IpIntelligenceData.Longitude
member.summary: Average longitude of the IP. For privacy, this is randomized within around 1 kilometer of the result. Randomized result will change only once per day.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.IpIntelligenceData.Mcc
member.summary: The mobile country code of the network the device is connected to.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.IpIntelligenceData.PlatformDiversity
member.summary: Refers to the diversity of software observed from the IP range. An integer between 1-10, a lower value indicates a low number of software seen per IP address, while a higher value indicates a high number of software seen per IP address. A 0 value indicates that the probability is unknown.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.IpIntelligenceData.Region
member.summary: The name of the geographical region that the supplied location is in.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.IpIntelligenceData.RegisteredCountry
member.summary: Country code of the registered range.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.IpIntelligenceData.RegisteredName
member.summary: Name of the IP range. This is usually the owner.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.IpIntelligenceData.RegisteredOwner
member.summary: Registered owner of the range.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.IpIntelligenceData.State
member.summary: The name of the state that the supplied location is in.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.IpIntelligenceData.Suburb
member.summary: The name of the suburb that the supplied location is in.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.IpIntelligenceData.TimeZoneIana
member.summary: The time zone at the supplied location in the IANA Time Zone format.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.IpIntelligenceData.TimeZoneOffset
member.summary: The offset from UTC in minutes in the supplied location, at the time that the value is produced.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.IpIntelligenceData.Town
member.summary: The name of the town that the supplied location is in.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.IpIntelligenceData.ZipCode
member.summary: The zip or postal code that the supplied location falls under.

member.name: T:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.Messages
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.Messages.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.Messages.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.Messages.ExceptionCannotUpdateResults
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to The results collection for this data object has already been accessed and must not be updated..

member.name: T:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.Services.CloudDataHelper
member.summary: Static helper for converting cloud data values to AspectPropertyValue types and creating APV dictionaries.

member.name: F:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.Services.CloudDataHelper.IpTypeConverter
member.summary: Default type converter that handles IPAddress and WktString types. Used by IpiCloudEngine for IP intelligence data.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.Services.CloudDataHelper.ToValueForAPV(System.Object,System.Type,System.Func{System.Object,System.Type,System.Object})
member.summary: Convert value returned by cloud in json (weakly typed) to a value expected by AspectPropertyValue (strongly typed).
member.param: The raw value from JSON
The target type
Optional type-specific converter for handling special types like IPAddress. Called first to give type-specific converters priority over generic handling.
member.returns: The converted value

member.name: M:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.Services.CloudDataHelper.ToValueForAPVSimple(System.Object,System.Type)
member.summary: Base conversion for simple types like JavaScript and Dictionary.
Use the supplied cloud data to create a dictionary of instances.
member.param: The cloud data to be processed
The meta-data for the properties
Optional type-specific converter for handling special types.
Optional logger for warnings
Engine type name for logging
member.returns: A dictionary with values converted to AspectPropertyValue where needed

member.name: T:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.Services.IMetaDataService
member.summary: Helper service for working with IP intelligence meta-data.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.Services.IMetaDataService.DefaultProfileIdForComponent(System.Byte)
member.summary: Get the default profile Id for the specified component
member.param: The component Id to get the default for
member.returns: The default profile Id for the specified component

member.name: M:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.Services.IMetaDataService.DefaultProfilesIds
member.summary: Get all default profile Ids
member.returns: A dictionary with key of component Id and value of profile Id.

member.name: T:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.Services.MetaDataService
member.summary: Helper service that removes some of the complexity of dealing with meta-data from multiple engines. Also mitigates some of the performance penalties that come from repeatedly querying certain meta-data collections via the SWIG wrappers.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.Services.MetaDataService.#ctor(FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.FlowElements.IOnPremiseIpiEngine[])
member.summary: Constructor
member.param: An array of engines that are involved in populating IP intelligence data properties. For example, this could be one engine that populates autonomous system number properties and another that populates internet service provider properties.
member.exception: Thrown if a required parameter is null

member.name: M:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.Services.MetaDataService.DefaultProfileIdForComponent(System.Byte)
member.summary: Get the default profile Id for the specified component
member.param: The component Id to get the default for
member.returns: The default profile Id for the specified component

member.name: M:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.Services.MetaDataService.DefaultProfilesIds
member.summary: Get all default profile Ids
member.returns: A dictionary with key of component Id and value of profile Id.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Shared.Services.MetaDataService.Engine_RefreshCompleted(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Called when the engine is refreshed with new data.

member.name: T:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.IIpIntelligenceData
member.summary: Represents a data object containing values relating to an IP. This includes the network, and location.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.IIpIntelligenceData.AccuracyRadiusMax
member.summary: Radius in kilometers of the circle centred around the most probable location that encompasses the entire area. Where multiple areas are returned, this will only cover the area the most probable location is in. See Areas property. This will likely be a very large distance. It is recommend to use the AccuracyRadiusMin property.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.IIpIntelligenceData.AccuracyRadiusMin
member.summary: Radius in kilometers of the largest circle centred around the most probable location that fits within the area. Where multiple areas are returned, only the area that the most probable location falls within is considered. See Areas property.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.IIpIntelligenceData.Areas
member.summary: Any shapes associated with the location. Usually this is the area which the IP range covers. This is returned as a WKT String stored as a reduced format of WKB.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.IIpIntelligenceData.Asn
member.summary: Autonomous System Number associated with the IP address.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.IIpIntelligenceData.AsnName
member.summary: The name registered to the Asn associated with the IP address.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.IIpIntelligenceData.BrowserDiversity
member.summary: Refers to the diversity of browsers observed from the IP range. An integer between 1-10, a lower value indicates a low number of browsers seen per IP address, while a higher value indicates a high number of browsers seen per IP address. A 0 value indicates that the probability is unknown.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.IIpIntelligenceData.ConnectionType
member.summary: Indicates the type of connection being used. Returns either Broadband, Cellular, or Hosting and Anonymous.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.IIpIntelligenceData.ContinentCode2
member.summary: The 3-character ISO 3166-1 continent code for the supplied location.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.IIpIntelligenceData.ContinentName
member.summary: The name of the continent the supplied location is in.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.IIpIntelligenceData.Country
member.summary: The name of the country that the supplied location is in.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.IIpIntelligenceData.CountryCode
member.summary: The 2-character ISO 3166-1 code of the country that the supplied location is in.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.IIpIntelligenceData.CountryCode3
member.summary: The 3-character ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code of the country that the supplied location is in.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.IIpIntelligenceData.CountryCodesGeographical
member.summary: A list of countries in ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code format that overlap with the area likely associated with the provided evidence, weighted and ordered by each country's proportion of the area. Administrative areas that cannot be cleanly resolved to the country level will not contribute to the resulting data.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.IIpIntelligenceData.CountryCodesPopulation
member.summary: A list of countries in ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code format that overlap with the area likely associated with the provided evidence, weighted and ordered by each country's proportion of the total population within the area. Administrative areas that cannot be cleanly resolved to the country level will not contribute to the resulting data.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.IIpIntelligenceData.County
member.summary: The name of the county that the supplied location is in. In this case, a county is defined as an administrative sub-section of a country or state.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.IIpIntelligenceData.CurrencyCode
member.summary: The Alpha-3 ISO 4217 code of the currency associated with the supplied location.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.IIpIntelligenceData.DialCode
member.summary: ITU international telephone numbering plan code for the country.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.IIpIntelligenceData.HardwareDiversity
member.summary: Refers to the diversity of hardware devices observed from the IP range. An integer between 1-10, a lower value indicates a low number of devices seen per IP address, while a higher value indicates a high number of devices seen per IP address. A 0 value indicates that the probability is unknown.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.IIpIntelligenceData.HumanProbability
member.summary: The confidence that the IP address is a human user versus associated with hosting. A 0-10 value where; 0-3: Low confidence the user is human, 4-6: Medium confidence, 7-10: High confidence. A -1 value indicates that the probability is unknown.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.IIpIntelligenceData.Ip
member.summary: The IPv4 address of the request.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.IIpIntelligenceData.IpRangeEnd
member.summary: End of the IP range to which the evidence IP belongs.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.IIpIntelligenceData.IpRangeStart
member.summary: Start of the IP range to which the evidence IP belongs.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.IIpIntelligenceData.IpV6
member.summary: The IPv6 address of the request.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.IIpIntelligenceData.IsBroadband
member.summary: Indicates whether the IP address is associated with a broadband connection. Includes DSL, Cable, Fibre, and Satellite connections.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.IIpIntelligenceData.IsCellular
member.summary: Indicates whether the IP address is associated with a cellular network.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.IIpIntelligenceData.IsEu
member.summary: Indicates whether the country of the supplied location is within the European Union.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.IIpIntelligenceData.IsHosted
member.summary: Indicates whether the IP address is associated with hosting. Includes both hosting and anonymised connections such as hosting networks, hosting ASNs, VPNs, proxies, TOR networks, and unreachable IP addresses.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.IIpIntelligenceData.Iso31662Lvl4
member.summary: The ISO 3166-2 code for the supplied location. This is using the 'ISO3166-2-lvl4' property from OpenStreetMap.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.IIpIntelligenceData.Iso31662Lvl4SubdivisionOnly
member.summary: The alphanumeric code representing the subdivision from the ISO 3166-2 code of the supplied location. This is using the 'ISO3166-2-lvl4' property from OpenStreetMap.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.IIpIntelligenceData.Iso31662Lvl8
member.summary: The ISO 3166-2 code for the supplied location. This is using the 'ISO3166-2-lvl8' property from OpenStreetMap.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.IIpIntelligenceData.Iso31662Lvl8SubdivisionOnly
member.summary: The alphanumeric code representing the subdivision from the ISO 3166-2 code of the supplied location. This is using the 'ISO3166-2-lvl8' property from OpenStreetMap.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.IIpIntelligenceData.IsProxy
member.summary: Indicates whether the IP address is associated with a Proxy server.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.IIpIntelligenceData.IsPublicRouter
member.summary: Indicates whether the IP address is associated with a public router.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.IIpIntelligenceData.IsTor
member.summary: Indicates whether the IP address is associated with a TOR server.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.IIpIntelligenceData.IsVPN
member.summary: Indicates whether the IP address is associated with a VPN server.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.IIpIntelligenceData.LanguageCode
member.summary: The Alpha-2 ISO 639 Language code associated with the supplied location.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.IIpIntelligenceData.Latitude
member.summary: Average latitude of the IP. For privacy, this is randomized within around 1 kilometer of the result. Randomized result will change only once per day.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.IIpIntelligenceData.LocationConfidence
member.summary: The confidence in the town and country provided.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.IIpIntelligenceData.Longitude
member.summary: Average longitude of the IP. For privacy, this is randomized within around 1 kilometer of the result. Randomized result will change only once per day.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.IIpIntelligenceData.Mcc
member.summary: The mobile country code of the network the device is connected to.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.IIpIntelligenceData.PlatformDiversity
member.summary: Refers to the diversity of software observed from the IP range. An integer between 1-10, a lower value indicates a low number of software seen per IP address, while a higher value indicates a high number of software seen per IP address. A 0 value indicates that the probability is unknown.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.IIpIntelligenceData.Region
member.summary: The name of the geographical region that the supplied location is in.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.IIpIntelligenceData.RegisteredCountry
member.summary: Country code of the registered range.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.IIpIntelligenceData.RegisteredName
member.summary: Name of the IP range. This is usually the owner.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.IIpIntelligenceData.RegisteredOwner
member.summary: Registered owner of the range.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.IIpIntelligenceData.State
member.summary: The name of the state that the supplied location is in.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.IIpIntelligenceData.Suburb
member.summary: The name of the suburb that the supplied location is in.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.IIpIntelligenceData.TimeZoneIana
member.summary: The time zone at the supplied location in the IANA Time Zone format.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.IIpIntelligenceData.TimeZoneOffset
member.summary: The offset from UTC in minutes in the supplied location, at the time that the value is produced.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.IIpIntelligenceData.Town
member.summary: The name of the town that the supplied location is in.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.IIpIntelligenceData.ZipCode
member.summary: The zip or postal code that the supplied location falls under.
